# Aryn CodeMirror Merge Fork

This directory is an Aryn-maintained fork of `@codemirror/merge`.

The package is intentionally published to the app as `@aryn/codemirror-merge`
through a local `file:` dependency. It must not be treated as the official
`@codemirror/merge` package.

## Why This Fork Exists

Meo diff split, Meo unified diff, and Meo live inline diff need a stable way to
feed precomputed Git-style line chunks into CodeMirror merge. The official
package owns its chunk generation internally, which makes large Markdown diffs
harder to tune and makes Meo hunk navigation/action mapping less predictable.

The fork adds a narrow extension point for Aryn's Git diff line model while
keeping CodeMirror merge as the rendering engine for Meo diff modes.

## Aryn Extensions

- `DiffConfig.overrideChunks`
  Allows callers to provide line chunks generated by Aryn's VS Code style diff
  adapter instead of CodeMirror merge's default chunk conversion.

- `DiffConfig.incrementalUpdates`
  Keeps document updates on the package's incremental path when
  `overrideChunks` is configured. This avoids full rebuilds in editor paths that
  need live typing performance.

These extensions are consumed by:

- `src/features/editor/lib/meo-native-diff-split.ts`
- `src/features/editor/lib/meo-native-live-inline-diff.ts`
- `src/vendor/meo/shared/gitDiffLineFlags.ts`

The fork must remain an implementation detail of Meo diff internals. General
Git diff routing, workspace state, and non-Markdown diff rendering should not
import it.

## Upgrade Rules

When rebasing this fork on a newer upstream CodeMirror merge release:

1. Preserve `overrideChunks` and `incrementalUpdates`.
2. Re-run the CodeMirror merge boundary test.
3. Re-run Meo diff navigation, decoration, live inline diff, and performance
   tests.
4. Verify Markdown Git diff still opens through Meo split/unified modes and
   non-Markdown Git diff still opens through Monaco.

Relevant commands:

```powershell
npm.cmd run typecheck
npm.cmd test -- test/codemirror-merge-boundary.spec.ts test/codemirror-merge-deco.spec.ts test/git-diff-navigation.spec.ts
npm.cmd test -- test/meo-live-inline-diff.spec.ts test/meo-performance.spec.ts
```
